Name: AB Aluminum & Screens

Project Details:
AB Aluminum & Screens is a licensed and experienced outdoor living contractor serving homeowners across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach County with a comprehensive range of services including aluminum pergolas, patio covers, louvered roof systems, pool screen enclosures, and patio screen rooms. Despite years of quality work and a growing referral base, their digital presence was significantly underperforming — their old website lacked the professional design, clear service structure, and local SEO optimization needed to compete for the volume of homeowners searching for outdoor living contractors across South Florida every day.

Senavia Corp designed and developed a clean, conversion-focused Webflow website that clearly communicates AB Aluminum's expertise across all five service categories while driving a steady stream of free design consultation requests. The design strategy prioritizes clarity and trust — using a clean white layout with bold red brand accents and high-quality project photography to establish immediate credibility with South Florida homeowners evaluating multiple contractors simultaneously.

Dedicated service pages for Pergolas & Patio Covers, Pool Screen Enclosures, Louvered Roof Systems, and Patio Screen Rooms were built with individual SEO strategies targeting city-specific search terms across their three-county service area. A recent projects gallery was organized by service category, giving visitors visual proof of craftsmanship for each offering. A financing availability section was developed as a standalone conversion element — directly addressing the price objection that prevents homeowners from taking action and positioning AB Aluminum as an accessible partner for any budget. A Google Reviews section displaying their 4.9-star rating was integrated to provide immediate third-party validation, and the free design consultation CTA was implemented in the header, hero, service pages, and footer to ensure every visitor has a clear, frictionless path to conversion.

AB Aluminum & Screens now has a digital platform that works as hard as their installation crews. Bodycontours Fajas is a premium Colombian shapewear retailer based in Tamarac, Florida, specializing in post-surgical compression garments for Stage 1, 2, and 3 recovery — serving women who need medically appropriate, high-quality fajas after body contouring procedures, C-sections, tummy tucks, and liposuction. With a physical retail location in South Florida and a growing base of online customers, they needed a Shopify e-commerce platform that could communicate medical-grade quality, simplify the purchasing decision for post-surgery patients, and capture the large volume of women searching for trusted Colombian shapewear specialists online.

Senavia Corp designed and developed a conversion-optimized Shopify store that balances medical authority with femininity, confidence, and style. Name: Chamakos Grooming

Project Details:
Chamakos is a premium men's grooming and care brand built by barbers for barbers — and the modern man who refuses to settle for anything less than a professional-grade shave. With a growing product line including signature shaving solutions, straight razor blade holders, face mask applicators, and complete barber kits, they had a compelling brand and a loyal following among barbershop professionals — but their e-commerce store was failing to convert visitors into buyers, lacked proper product organization, and did nothing to communicate the brand's bold, premium identity to new customers discovering them online.

Senavia Corp designed and developed a custom Shopify e-commerce store built around Chamakos's core brand promise: made for men, approved by barbers. Every design decision — from the deep black and gold color palette to the honeycomb texture backgrounds and high-contrast product photography — was made to immediately communicate premium quality and masculine identity. Chamakos now has an e-commerce platform that matches the boldness of their brand and the quality of their products.
